mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRV_HOTEL_RESERVATION (HOTEL_RESV_ID, HOTEL_ID, MEMBER_ID, CHECK_IN, CHECK_OUT, GUEST_NAME, TOTAL_PRICE) VALUES (TRV_HOTEL_RESV_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{hotelId}, #{memberId}, #{checkIn}, #{checkOut}, #{guestName}, #{totalPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT R.HOTEL_RESV_ID AS hotelResvId, R.HOTEL_ID AS hotelId, R.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, R.CHECK_IN AS checkIn, R.CHECK_OUT AS checkOut, R.GUEST_NAME AS guestName, R.RESERVE_DATE AS reserveDate, R.STATUS AS status, H.HOTEL_NAME AS hotelName, H.LOCATION AS location, R.TOTAL_PRICE AS totalPrice, H.PRICE_PER_NIGHT AS pricePerNight FROM TRV_HOTEL_RESERVATION R JOIN TRV_HOTEL H ON R.HOTEL_ID = H.HOTEL_ID WHERE R.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY R.HOTEL_RESV_ID DESC

SELECT HOTEL_RESV_ID AS hotelResvId, HOTEL_ID AS hotelId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, CHECK_IN AS checkIn, CHECK_OUT AS checkOut, GUEST_NAME AS guestName, RESERVE_DATE AS reserveDate, STATUS AS status FROM TRV_HOTEL_RESERVATION WHERE HOTEL_RESV_ID = #{hotelResvId}
